x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: MID Servers are the execution layer for AI Agent-triggered discovery probes and remediation workflows. Missing or down MID Servers cause agent infrastructure actions to fail silently.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: MID Server Health and Version Currency
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Deploy, validate, and upgrade MID Servers to the current instance version via ecc_agent_list.do. Ensure at least one MID Server is Up and validated per network zone. MID Servers are the execution layer for AI Agent-triggered discovery probes and remediation workflows.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.sys_name: MID Server Health and Version Currency

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_b2f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c12
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[MID Servers are the execution layer for AI Agent-triggered discovery probes and remediation workflows. Missing or down MID Servers cause agent infrastructure actions to fail silently.]]></ai_justification><check_name>MID Server Health and Version Currency</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('ecc_agent');
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No MID Servers found',
            finding: 'No MID Servers found on this instance. If this is a cloud-only deployment with no on-premise infrastructure, this check is not applicable. Otherwise, MID Servers are required for discovery and AI Agent-triggered remediation.'
        };
    }

    var gaHealthy = new GlideAggregate('ecc_agent');
    gaHealthy.addQuery('status', 'Up');
    gaHealthy.addQuery('validated', true);
    gaHealthy.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaHealthy.query();
    var healthy = gaHealthy.next() ? parseInt(gaHealthy.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = total + ' total MID Servers | ' + healthy + ' up and validated';

    if (healthy >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: healthy + ' of ' + total + ' MID Servers are up and validated. Now Assist ITOM AI Agent-triggered discovery probes and remediation workflows can execute.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' MID Server(s) found but none are up and validated. Now Assist ITOM AI Agent actions requiring on-premise access will fail until at least one MID Server is healthy.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITOM</module><number>CHK0000371</number><order>180</order><remediation_guidance>Deploy, validate, and upgrade MID Servers to the current instance version via ecc_agent_list.do. Ensure at least one MID Server is Up and validated per network zone. MID Servers are the execution layer for AI Agent-triggered discovery probes and remediation workflows.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>b2f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c12</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>MID Server Health and Version Currency</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_b2f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c12</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
sys_update_version.record_name: MID Server Health and Version Currency

sys_audit_delete.display_value: MID Server Health and Version Currency

sys_metadata_delete.sys_name: MID Server Health and Version Currency
